song_name: Chelsea Cutler - Crazier Things - Noah Kahan - Stick Season
version_description: A custom mashup of two popular Noah Kahan songs with verses from Chelsea Cutler.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro] Two bars of D

[Crazier Things]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I've been trying not to think about it, I can't help it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I know you don't wanna  hear from me, but I am selfish [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
It kills me inside that you can drink on Friday nights[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]       
Not even pick up the phone[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
It amazes me you move on so easily[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]                             
From someone that you once called home[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
I wish you had enough discipline for the both of us[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
Just because I don't know how to turn off the way I feel[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]
I know you always fell out love so damn easily, but honestly[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
I don't think you ever had something real[/tab]


[Stick Season]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
Now I am stuck between my anger and the blame that I can't face and[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
memories something even smoking weed can't replace and I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
terrified of weather cause I see you when it rains[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
and doc told me to travel but there's Covid on the planes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
Now I am fucked, I'm fucked, and I suck,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
and you suck, and this sucks, yeah I'm fucked[/tab]


[Crazier Things]

[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
Until you met me[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Drinks out in the country[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Ooh, you looked so pretty[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]
Think I fell in love before I even knew your birthday[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Kissed you on our first date[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Somehow, I knew someday[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
This would hurt 'cause I could never let you go[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]F#m[/ch]
I wish you had enough discipline for the both of us[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
Just because I don't know how to turn off the way I feel[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]F#m[/ch]
I know you always fell out love so damn easily, but honestly[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I don't think you ever had something real[/tab]


[Stick Season]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
And I love Vermont but it's the season of the sticks and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
saw your mom and she forgot that I existed and its[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
half my fault I'm just playin to be the victim[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
I drink alcohol till my friends come home for Christmas and I'll[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
dream each night of some version of you that I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
might not have but I did not lose now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm tire tracks and one pair of shoes and I'm[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
split in half but that'll have to do.[/tab]

[Crazier Things]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I've been trying not to think of this as something tragic[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause our two paths might cross again Crazier things have happened[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]        
And I realize lightning strikes just once, not twice[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
And shooting stars are burning rocks[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]F#m[/ch]
So I spend weeks inside, drowning in these dreams of mine[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E[/ch]
And wondering if I'm worth your thoughts[/tab]

[tab]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
The first time that you told me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
You thought that you loved me[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
That bar in the country[/tab]
       N.C.
I thought you were drunk
[tab]                              [ch]E[/ch]
But I knew deep down that you meant it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
Wish that I had said it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I was scared to let it happen[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
But it happened and now I cannot forget it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, I'll spend my whole life[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Missing a part of me, part of me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, I'll spend my whole life[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Hoping your heart is free, heart is free[/tab]
